body:
# Fin Moorhouse

**Role:** Researcher

[Fin Moorhouse](https://www.linkedin.com/in/finm/) has been a researcher at the [Future of Humanity Institute](https://www.futureofhumanityinstitute.org/) and [Longview Philanthropy](https://www.longview.org/), and has a first-class BA in Philosophy from Cambridge. He has also written extensively on [his website](https://finmoorhouse.com/) and co-hosts the “[Hear this Idea](https://hearthisidea.com/)” podcast.
text: Fin Moorhouse Role: Researcher Fin Moorhouse has been a researcher at the Future of Humanity Institute and Longview Philanthropy, and has a first-class BA in Philosophy from Cambridge. He has also written extensively on his website and co-hosts the “Hear this Idea” podcast.
